steps.expected: Worldview tab active, scene strip with New Scene button
steps.observed: Worldview tab highlighted with amber, scene strip shows 'New Scene' button, empty state message 'Create a new scene to get started'

steps.expected: New scene chip appears with amber highlight, Create a 3D World CTA visible
steps.observed: Scene 1 chip created with amber highlight and glow. 'Create a 3D World' CTA card with Globe2 icon and dashed border displayed in canvas area. Bottom prompt bar with Sparkles icon visible.

steps.expected: World creator panel opens with text/image toggle, textarea, model selector, Generate World button
steps.observed: World creator panel opened with: Text/Image toggle (Text active), textarea placeholder 'Describe the 3D world you want to create...', Model dropdown set to 'Marble 0.1-plus', amber 'Generate World' button with Zap icon

steps.action: Enter prompt 'A beautiful mountain landscape with a lake and pine trees'
steps.expected: Prompt text appears in textarea, Generate World button becomes active (amber)
steps.observed: Prompt text entered, Generate World button turned amber/active

steps.expected: Graceful error handling - error toast, inline error state, no crash
steps.observed: Inline error state displayed: 'World generation failed' heading, 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function' description, amber 'Retry' button. Toast notification appeared at bottom: 'Failed to send a request to the Edge Function'. UI remained stable, no crash.

steps.expected: No unhandled promise rejections or console errors
steps.observed: Console errors check returned clean - no errors detected

evidence.network: POST to worldlabs-proxy edge function failed as expected (no API key configured)

steps.action: Seed store with 2 generated shots via browser console (addGeneratedShot with sceneId, status:completed, images array)
steps.expected: Generated shot cards appear in GENERATED SHOTS grid
steps.observed: Two generated shot cards displayed: 'Mountain' (orange, flux-dev badge) and 'Ocean' (blue, flux-pro-ultra badge) in 2-column grid

steps.action: Hover over first generated shot card
steps.observed: Plus button (circular, dark background, top-right corner) appeared on hover with aria-label='Add to canvas' and title='Add to canvas'

steps.expected: toast.success('Added to canvas!') appears, useCanvasStore.addObject() called with type 'image'
steps.observed: Success toast 'Added to canvas!' appeared at bottom-right with green checkmark. Canvas store verified: 1 object added with type 'image'.

steps.expected: Canvas store has new object of type 'image'

frictions.description: The Plus/Add button on generated shot cards is only visible on hover (CSS class 'hidden group-hover:flex'). Required using mouse move to specific coordinates before the button ref appeared in snapshots.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser mouse move to hover over the card, then the button appeared in the interactive snapshot

frictions.description: The addGeneratedShot store action requires a GeneratedShot object with sceneId, status, and images[] fields — different from the simplified signature suggested in the task prompt. Had to read the actual type definition to use correct structure.
frictions.resolution: Checked source code for GeneratedShot type definition and used correct fields: { id, sceneId, takeId, prompt, model, status:'completed', images:[{id, url, width, height}], createdAt }

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-001 confirmed full worldview workflow (navigate → create scene → open creator → enter prompt → generate world → graceful error handling) with smooth UI transitions and no console errors. VAL-POLISH-003 confirmed Add to Canvas functionality: hover reveals Plus button on generated shot cards, clicking calls useCanvasStore.addObject() with type 'image', and toast.success('Added to canvas!') appears.
